race.comment: LOWESTOFT (10) is knocking on the door and looks to have found a very winnable affair here, just finding one better when well backed at Colac last time out. Back to 1400m is a tiny niggle but she draws for a nice trail an this race lacks depth. CHRONIC (3) was okay fresh at Ballarat over 1200m with improvement to come. He should improve up in trip and can be hitting the line. WHATTA MAN (6) resumes for his second campaign and could be an improver this time around while BOLSHIE (2) might benefit from coming back in trip.
